name: HRC_MESSAGE_INCOMING
description: This table is used to store the incoming messages. The messages can be email, SMS or any other form of communication.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key too represent incoming message

columns.Name: SUBJECT
columns.Comments: Subject of the message or Message itself in case of short message like SMS

columns.Name: WORKFLOW_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the workflow which read the email

columns.Name: WORKFLOW_CODE
columns.Comments: Workflow code which have processed this message

columns.Name: SERVER_MESSAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Message Id of the email in the Server.

columns.Name: FROM_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Address from which message is recieved

columns.Name: ACCOUNT_ID
columns.Comments: List of comma seperated address to which message is intented to

columns.Name: MESSAGE_DATA
columns.Comments: Large message Data like content and Headers

columns.Name: MESSAGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the message like EMAIL , SMS

columns.Name: IS_MESSAGE_READ
columns.Comments: Will take value Y or N to indicate whether message is read and processed

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_PROCESSING_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the message processing

columns.Name: ATTACHMENT_COUNT
columns.Comments: Number of attachments present

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
